hero.description: From keyword to published article — AI-generated content that ranks on Google and gets cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. All from one platform.
hero.poweredBy: Powered by <claude>Claude</claude>, <gpt>GPT-4o</gpt> & <gemini>Gemini</gemini> — each model used where it performs best.
hero.mockupArticleTitle: 10 Best SEO Practices for 2026: A Complete Guide

integrations.heading: Works with the tools you already use

features.title: Everything You Need for
features.description: One platform to research, write, optimize, publish, and track — powered by AI that understands SEO.
features.feature1Description: Generate full-length, SEO-optimized articles from a single keyword or topic — ready to publish.
features.feature2Description: Create structured content plans with headings, subheadings, and key points before writing.
features.feature3Description: Track when ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews cite your content. Be the first to know when AI engines discover — or drop — your pages.
features.feature4Description: Track rankings with Google Search Console integration and actionable performance insights.
features.feature5Description: Create and schedule social posts across platforms — all from one dashboard.
features.feature6Description: Upload brand documents and style guides so the AI writes in your voice, every time.

howItWorks.title: From keyword to
howItWorks.description: Six steps. One platform. A-Stats turns a single keyword into a full growth loop — writing, optimization, publishing, distribution, and AI-answer pickup.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Ranking + AI visibility potential automatically found.
howItWorks.step1Detail: High-intent topic discovered with strong SERP gap and AI-answer potential. A-Stats scans your niche, analyses competitor gaps, and surfaces the keywords most likely to drive traffic and AI citations.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Full SEO structure + topical authority created.
howItWorks.step2Detail: Outline, headings, entity coverage, and expert-style structure generated in minutes. The AI pipeline produces a publish-ready article with proper semantic structure, internal linking hints, and schema-ready formatting.
howItWorks.step3Detail: On-page gaps closed, internal linking opportunities suggested, and structure improved. Every article is scored for SEO completeness so you know exactly what to improve before publishing.
howItWorks.step4Detail: Content shipped to your WordPress site with full metadata, featured images, SEO titles, and schema markup. One click, and your article is live and indexed — no copy-pasting or manual formatting.
howItWorks.step5Detail: Promotion kicks in automatically: LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram posts generated and scheduled from your article. Your content reaches audiences across every platform without extra effort.
howItWorks.step6Detail: Visibility compounds as your article gets picked up in AI-generated answers. A-Stats tracks when ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity cite your content — a new growth channel most tools ignore.

showcases.showcase1Description: Our AI doesn't just write — it researches. Every article is built on keyword analysis, competitor insights, and SEO best practices so you rank from day one.
showcases.showcase1Bullet1: Full-length articles from a single keyword
showcases.showcase1Bullet2: Built-in keyword density and readability scoring
showcases.showcase2Title: SEO Analytics You Can Act On
showcases.showcase2Description: Connect Google Search Console and get a clear view of what's working. Track impressions, clicks, and rankings — then let AI suggest your next move.
showcases.showcase3Description: Turn every article into a week of social content. Schedule posts across platforms and keep your audience engaged without the extra work.
showcases.mockupPostText: Just published: "10 Best SEO Practices for 2026" 🚀 Our AI-generated article hit page 1 in 3 weeks...

aeo.title: Get Found by AI, Not Just Google
aeo.description: The next wave of search happens inside ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. A-Stats tracks your AEO score so you know exactly when — and how — AI engines cite your content.
aeo.card1Description: See how AI answer engines perceive each of your pages with a 0–100 AEO score updated regularly.
aeo.card2Description: Get notified when AI systems start or stop citing your content so you can act before rankings drop.
aeo.card3Description: Get AI recommendations on how to restructure your content to win featured AI answers.

whoItsFor.title: Built for
whoItsFor.description: Whether you're a solo blogger or a 50-person agency, A-Stats scales with you.
whoItsFor.segment1Description: Write and publish SEO-optimized articles faster than ever. No team needed — the AI handles research, writing, and optimization.
whoItsFor.segment2Description: Collaborate on content strategy, track rankings, and keep your editorial calendar full with AI-assisted workflows.
whoItsFor.segment3Description: Manage multiple clients with white-label portals, bulk generation, API access, and dedicated support.

testimonials.title: Loved by Content Creators
testimonials.description: See what our users have to say about the platform.
testimonials.testimonial1Quote: We went from publishing twice a month to twice a week — and organic traffic grew 340% in 6 months. The AI articles consistently rank on page one within weeks.
testimonials.testimonial2Quote: The Knowledge Vault feature is a game-changer. The AI finally sounds like our brand instead of generic fluff. Our editorial review time dropped from 3 hours to 20 minutes per article.
testimonials.testimonial3Quote: I replaced three separate tools with this one platform and saved $247/month. Content creation, SEO tracking, and social scheduling — all in one place with better results.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.description: Choose the plan that fits your content needs. Upgrade or downgrade anytime.
pricing.planFreeDescription: Try it out, no credit card needed

blog.title: From Our
blog.description: SEO tips, content strategy, and product updates from the A-Stats team.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.faq1Answer: Yes. Every account starts on the free tier with no credit card required. You can generate articles and explore the platform before upgrading.
faq.faq2Question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq.faq2Answer: Yes. There are no contracts or cancellation fees. You can downgrade or cancel from your account settings at any time.
faq.faq3Question: Who owns the content generated by A-Stats?
faq.faq3Answer: You do — 100%. All content generated on our platform belongs to you to publish, repurpose, or sell.
faq.faq4Answer: AEO is the practice of optimizing your content to be cited by AI systems like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. A-Stats tracks your AEO score and alerts you when AI engines start or stop citing your pages.
faq.faq5Answer: Yes. Connect your WordPress site in your project settings. Once linked, you can publish articles directly from the A-Stats editor complete with formatting, images, and metadata.
faq.faq6Answer: A-Stats supports content generation in English, Spanish, French, German, Romanian, and more languages are being added regularly.
